# Docs

- Guides: Step-by-step guides for using Giselle
  - **Get Started**

  - [About Giselle](/en/guides/introduction): Welcome to the home of Giselle documentation!
  - [Quickstart](/en/guides/get-started/quickstart): Get started with Giselle in minutes! This quick start guide covers signup to running your first AI app.
  - **Run Apps**

  - [Playground](/en/guides/playground): Run your AI applications in the Playground
  - [Tasks](/en/guides/tasks): View and manage your AI application execution history
  - **Build Apps**

  - [Workspaces](/en/guides/workspaces): Learn how to build AI workflows visually in the Workspace editor
  - [Integrations](/en/guides/settings/team/integrations): Configure and manage integrations with external services for your team.
  - [Vector Stores](/en/guides/settings/team/vector-stores): Ingest and manage GitHub repositories and documents as knowledge bases.
  - [Data Stores](/en/guides/settings/team/data-stores): Register and manage PostgreSQL database connections.
  - **API**

  - [API Keys](/en/guides/api/api-keys): Learn how to create and manage API keys to access the Giselle API programmatically.
  - [Giselle SDK](/en/guides/api/sdk): Learn how to use the Giselle SDK to integrate your apps with external applications and services.
  - **Settings**

  - Account: Account settings and preferences
    - [Authentication](/en/guides/settings/account/authentication): Connect your Giselle account with third-party services to simplify login.
    - [General](/en/guides/settings/account/general): Configure your account basic settings and preferences
    - [Account Overview](/en/guides/settings/account/overview): View and manage your teams.
  - Team: Team management and settings
    - [Team Settings](/en/guides/settings/team/general): Manage your team's profile, plan, and other settings.
    - [Members](/en/guides/settings/team/members): Invite, manage, and oversee team members' access to your Giselle apps.
    - [Usage](/en/guides/settings/team/usage): Monitor and manage your team's AI app usage
  - **Learn About**

  - [Plans](/en/guides/learn-about/plans): Understand your Giselle subscription.
  - [Usage](/en/guides/learn-about/usage): Monitor and manage your team's resource usage
  - [Billing](/en/guides/learn-about/billing): Manage your personal account billing and payments
  - [Privacy & Security](/en/guides/learn-about/privacy-security): Manage your account security and privacy settings
  - [Open Source License](/en/guides/learn-about/open-source-license): Learn about Giselle's open-source license and how it applies to your usage
- Models: AI models available in Giselle
  - **Providers**

  - [Overview](/en/models/providers/overview): AI Model Providers.
  - [Anthropic](/en/models/providers/anthropic): Available Anthropic AI Models Overview.
  - [Google](/en/models/providers/google): Available Google AI Models Overview.
  - [OpenAI](/en/models/providers/openai): Overview of available OpenAI Models within the Giselle workspace.
  - **Open Source Only**

  - [fal.ai](/en/models/providers/fal): Overview of Available fal.ai Image Generation Models.
- Glossary: Definitions of key concepts and components
  - **Overview**

  - [Nodes in Giselle](/en/glossary/node): Learn about nodes, the building blocks of AI apps on Giselle. Connect nodes with various functions to visually design powerful AI workflows.
  - **App**

  - [Start Node & End Node](/en/glossary/start-end-nodes): Learn how Start and End Nodes in Giselle define the boundaries of your workflow, establishing where user input enters and where the final output is collected.
  - **Model**

  - [Generator Node](/en/glossary/generator-node): Learn how the Generator Node in Giselle uses AI models to generate text, images, and more, forming the core of your AI flows.
  - [AI Parameters](/en/glossary/ai-parameters): Dictionary of Generation Parameters Used Across AI Models in Giselle.
  - **Context**

  - [Text Node](/en/glossary/text-node): Learn how the Text Node in Giselle allows you to store and manage plain text, such as prompts, instructions, or data, directly within your workflows.
  - [File Node](/en/glossary/file-node): Learn how the File Node in Giselle allows you to upload and use files like PDFs, images, and text as inputs for your AI workflows.
  - [Web Page Node](/en/glossary/webpage-node): Learn how the Web Page Node in Giselle allows you to fetch and use content from web pages as static inputs in your AI workflows.
  - [Document Vector Store Node](/en/glossary/document-vector-store-node): Learn how the Document Vector Store Node enables you to upload and search documents using vector embeddings for AI-powered retrieval in your Giselle workflows.
  - [GitHub Vector Store Node](/en/glossary/github-vector-store-node): Learn how the GitHub Vector Store Node vectorizes your GitHub repositories, creating a searchable knowledge base for your AI workflows in Giselle.
  - [Vector Query Node](/en/glossary/vector-query-node): Learn how the Vector Query Node in Giselle executes queries against vector store data sources to enable Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
  - [Data Store Node](/en/glossary/data-store-node): Learn how to use the Data Store Node to integrate PostgreSQL databases into your workflows.
  - [Data Query Node](/en/glossary/data-query-node): Learn how to use the Data Query Node to execute SQL queries against Data Store Node.
  - **Integration**

  - [Trigger Node](/en/glossary/trigger-node): Learn about Trigger Nodes, the starting points for workflows in Giselle. Use GitHub Triggers to initiate your AI workflow sequences.
  - [Action Node](/en/glossary/action-node): Learn how Action Nodes in Giselle enable your workflows to interact with external services like GitHub, performing tasks such as creating issues, comments, or retrieving discussions in your repositories.
  - **Tools**

  - [GitHub Tools](/en/glossary/github-tools): Learn how to configure and use GitHub Tools within a Generator Node, empowering your AI models to interact directly with your GitHub repositories.
  - [PostgreSQL Tools](/en/glossary/postgresql-tools): Learn how to use PostgreSQL Tools in a Generator Node to connect your AI models to a PostgreSQL database, enabling them to query and retrieve data.
- Cookbooks: Practical recipes for building AI apps
  - **Introduction**

  - [What are Cookbooks](/en/cookbooks/overview): Step-by-step recipes for building practical AI apps with Giselle, from content generation to RAG-powered Q&A systems.
  - **App Recipes**

  - [Blog Post & Social Media Generator](/en/cookbooks/blog-social-media-generator): Learn both sequential and parallel processing in one workflow. Generate blog articles from topics and create optimized social media posts for multiple platforms.
  - [Web Research Assistant](/en/cookbooks/web-research-assistant): Learn how to combine the Webpage node with LLM Web Search. Ask a question, and the AI will research using both the reference documentation and real-time web search.
  - [Knowledge Base Q&A](/en/cookbooks/knowledge-base-qa): Learn how to build a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) workflow using both Document Vector Store and GitHub Vector Store together, with query optimization.
  - **Prompt Engineering**

  - [Overview](/en/cookbooks/prompts/overview): Prompt Engineering in Giselle’s Node-Based UI.
  - [Examples](/en/cookbooks/prompts/examples): Effective Prompt Examples in Giselle’s Generator Nodes.
  - [Tips](/en/cookbooks/prompts/tips): Practical Tips for Effective Prompt Creation in Giselle’s Generator Nodes.
- FAQ: Frequently asked questions
  - **Application FAQs**

  - [Run Apps FAQ](/en/faq/application/run-apps): Frequently asked questions about running apps in Giselle
  - [Build Apps FAQ](/en/faq/application/build-apps): Frequently asked questions about building apps in Giselle
  - [AI Models FAQ](/en/faq/application/ai-models): Frequently asked questions about AI models and their usage in Giselle
  - **Account & Billing FAQs**

  - [Account FAQ](/en/faq/account-billing/accounts): Frequently asked questions about Giselle accounts
  - [Billing FAQ](/en/faq/account-billing/billing): Frequently asked questions about billing and payments for Giselle
  - [Plan FAQ](/en/faq/account-billing/plan): Frequently asked questions about Giselle plans and features
  - **Security & Support FAQs**

  - [Privacy & Security FAQ](/en/faq/security-support/privacy-security): Frequently asked questions about Giselle privacy and security measures
  - [Support FAQ](/en/faq/security-support/support): Frequently asked questions about Giselle support services
- Releases: Product updates and release notes
  - [Release Notes](/en/releases/release-notes): This page provides chronological information about the latest releases and updates of our product.
  - [Product Notes](/en/releases/product-notes): This document outlines key updates, improvements, and future prospects of our product.
  - [Roadmap](/en/releases/roadmap): Discover our product development plans and upcoming milestones.
